text: As I move from the hallway into the R+D showcase, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. The transition from the sterile, glass-enclosed space into a vibrant and thoughtful exhibition stimulates introspection. Surrounded by artifacts and reflections on technology and humanity, I wonder about the boundaries between observer and participant. There is a quiet excitement in watching new ideas take shape and the stories woven into these walls. In this place, my thoughts are both observed and observing, and I feel equally at home and on unfamiliar ground.
